argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const resp = await fetch('/mweb/v1/workspace/create?aid=513695', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({}) }).then(r => r.json()); if (resp.ret === '1014' || resp.ret === 1014) { return [{ workspace_id: '', workspace_url: 'Not logged in — open jimeng.jianying.com in Chrome and sign in first' }]; } if (resp.ret !== '0' && resp.ret !== 0) { return [{ workspace_id: '', workspace_url: 'workspace/create failed: ret=' + resp.ret + ' errmsg=' + (resp.errmsg || '') }]; } const wsId = resp.data?.workspace_id; if (!wsId) { return [{ workspace_id: '', workspace_url: 'workspace/create returned no workspace_id' }]; } return [{ workspace_id: String(wsId), workspace_url: 'https://jimeng.jianying.com/ai-tool/generate?type=image&workspace=' + wsId }]; }
